---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Summary

Describe the idea in one or two sentences.

## Problem To Solve

What limitation, pain point, or missing workflow does this address?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the change you would like to see.

## Alternatives Considered

List any alternative approaches or workarounds you considered.

## Additional Context

Links, examples, screenshots, or references.
